subcodes.first_line: O people of God! The Day is His Day and the Cause is His Cause. Blessed be they who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حزب الله یوم یوم اوست و امر امر او طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
